description_long: This is a modern, minimalist desk with a rectangular tabletop and two solid, flat side panels serving as legs. The desk is constructed from a single material, likely painted or laminated wood or engineered board, giving it a uniform dark blue-gray color. The design is simple and functional, with no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and geometric form. The surface appears smooth and hard, suitable for writing, working on a laptop, or placing office supplies. The underside is open, providing ample legroom and space for a chair. Its sturdy build and neutral color make it suitable for urban environments such as offices, libraries, or public workspaces.
description: A minimalist, rectangular desk with solid side panels and a smooth, dark blue-gray finish. The design is clean, sturdy, and functional, with no visible storage or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, open leg space, and solid side panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the desk and the solid, flat side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the open underside and side panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with the same solid side panel.
attribute_orientation: The intended user-facing side is the open long edge, with the solid side panels on the left and right; both long sides are functionally identical.
